HavenRise Realtors — Luxury Real Estate in Nairobi, Kenya

HavenRise Realtors is Nairobi's premier luxury real estate agency, specialising in exclusive off-plan and ready properties across Lavington, Westlands, Kilimani, Riverside, Runda and Kiambu. Properties from KES 6,900,000 with flexible payment plans.

📞 +254 728 686 089  |  ✉ havenriserealtors@gmail.com  |  📍 Ciata City Mall, Ridgeways, Block B, 2nd Floor, Nairobi

Luna Oak Residency

Luna Oak Residency — 3 Bed (160sqm)

Luna Oak Residency, Kilungu Road, Kilimani, Nairobi

From KSh 16,000,000

About This Property

Luna Oak Residency is an exclusive, contemporary master-planned community in Kilimani, Nairobi. This 3-bedroom all en-suite apartment (160 sqm) is the largest of the standard 3-bed layouts, offering spacious rooms and generous living areas. Within a 25-floor, 294-unit development with world-class amenities, competitive pricing, and superb connectivity to Nairobi's key destinations.

Quarterly
